track_a3_implication: Track A3 results invalidated by MSTL forward-looking leakage. Lag grid CV's monotonic RMSE-vs-lag pattern (lag 6w best, lag 14w worst) and the +41-59% triple-comparison RMSE degradation are consistent with shorter lags carrying more future information through the centered MSTL smoother. Re-design needed: replace MSTL trend exogenous with either (a) raw korea_search lagged, (b) one-sided rolling mean, or (c) expanding-window MSTL trend.
